title: Nipah Virus RNA Secondary Structure Analysis (115 Genomes)
author: tanigawa, masato
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository provides the minimal reproducibility package used for the Nipah virus (NiV) RNA secondary structure manuscript submission. 
 
 ## Scope 
 
 The package contains: 
 - input alignment and metadata for 115 complete NiV genomes, 
 - analysis scripts for metadata annotation and sliding-window consensus structure prediction, 
 - core result tables used in downstream manuscript reporting.
